title: Dark Blue Diamond Smp
description: Dark blue Look On amour and diamond Tools
body:
# Blue PvP texurepack Made by Kars / Nyyv
**Not Completed**
**What it includes**

- >  Bow pullout colour from: green / orange / red strongest
- >  Crossbow pullout colour from: green / orange / red strongest
- >  Blue Sweep hit
- >  Blue Widgets + hotbar Selector

**Some QOls**

1. No explosions Particles
1. Low Fire
1. Small Shield
1. Removed pumpkin blur 
 

**Add k.arz on discord if you find a glitch / suggestions**
